problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Piezoelectric. Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
